description_long: This is a stand-up pouch made of matte, light brown material with a large, rectangular label on the front. The label is mint green with white and black text, prominently displaying the product name 'SLIMBAR PROTEINA' and additional information in Spanish. The pouch has a flat base, allowing it to stand upright, and a heat-sealed top, typical for resealable snack or protein powder packaging. The sides are smooth and taper towards the top, giving the package a sleek, modern appearance. The label includes a blank white circle, possibly for batch or flavor marking, and smaller text indicating usage and ingredients. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for urban retail environments.
description: A matte, light brown stand-up pouch with a mint green and white label for 'SLIMBAR PROTEINA', featuring a modern, minimalistic design and resealable packaging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full mint green label with product name, usage, and a blank white circle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the pouch's slim profile and the way the label wraps slightly around the edges.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, again showing the label and pouch structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and label wrap seen in view 1.
attribute_brand_logo: The front label features the 'SLIMBAR PROTEINA' brand in bold black and white text, centered at the top of the mint green label.
attribute_flavor_indication: The label states 'sabor neutro' (neutral flavor) in black text below the product name.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: There is a block of small text on the label, likely listing ingredients and usage, but no detailed nutrition facts panel is visible.
